title: Merging a Column in a Group
excerpt: Hi, is it possible to Merge a column in a group on Monday? I’ve uploaded a screenshot to show you what I mean

posts.author: epjustin (Extus)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, is it possible to Merge a column in a group on Monday? I’ve uploaded a screenshot to show you what I mean

Screen Shot 2021-12-18 at 10.43.19 AM2226×1366 184 KB

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @epjustin
Merging cells like this is not possible. Monday follows a strict row / column grid. No cell / item / column merge capabilities.

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @epjustin

Thanks so much for your post!

As @basdebruin mentioned, it’s not currently possible to merge two columns together like you are able to in Excel.
That said, if you’re looking to extend the column width, you can do this by simply dragging the column to resize it.
You can hover over the column title, where it meets the column next to it and then drag this to your desired width.

image714×636 30.1 KB

I hope this helps! Remember to mark as solved if this answers your question

Best,

Dani

posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
